content:
Required inputs:
- material (M): Required to determine the material properties for thickness calculation as per ASME B31.3 §302.2.
- design_temperature (T): Required for evaluating the material strength and allowable stress at operating conditions as per ASME B31.3 §302.1.
- design_pressure (P): Required by ASME B31.3 §304.1.1 for thickness calculation.
- outside_diameter (D): Required to calculate the wall thickness based on the external dimensions of the pipe as per ASME B31.3 §304.3.
Could you please provide the design pressure and outside diameter for the pipe?

Required inputs:
- material: Required to determine the material properties for wall thickness calculations.
- design_temperature: Necessary for assessing the material strength and allowable stress at elevated temperatures.
- design_pressure (P): Required by ASME B31.3 §304.1.1 for thickness calculation.
- outside_diameter (D): Needed to calculate the wall thickness based on the external dimensions of the pipe.
